mano_cua.result_summary: 任务列表checkbox复选框交互正常：点击未勾选(○)成功切换为已勾选(✓)，点击已勾选成功切换回未勾选，多个项目验证均正常。注：在Chrome中测试（原任务要求Firefox），另发现次要bug—新建任务项时光标位置异常导致文本拼接
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Checkbox click interaction works correctly - clicking checkboxes in the task list properly toggles them between checked and unchecked states. Tested on multiple items (a, b, empty item, new task itemd). Minor bug: creating new task items results in text merging due to incorrect cursor placement after Enter.
